title: plicosepalus foliosus
intro: Plicosepalus foliosus is a plant species known as the 'yellow oleander', a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Plicosepalus foliosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to exercise caution when handling this plant due to its toxic compounds.
